See BEA recommandations

Glossary

We found 314 notified events

Need help about the search engine ?

1. Standard search engine

You can use the search engine  by entering for example the registration of the aircraft or a keyword (name of the manufacturer, the place of the event etc ...)

2. Advanced search filters

For a more precise search, you can use the search filters

- you can activate several filters at the same time (click on the + of each category, then tick the chosen filter)
- each activated filter is displayed at the top of the list

3. Investigations carried out by the BEA

The results include by default all events which have been notified to the BEA and which are carried out by the BEA or a foreign counterpart.

- to access the investigations carried out by the BEA, you must activate the "France" filter in "Investigation authority in charge".
- to differentiate the BEA investigations closed or in progress, you must then activate the corresponding filter in "status"

Serious incident to the Airbus A330 registered TC-LOL operated by Turkish Airlines on 31/12/2019 at Port Harcourt, Nigeria [Investigation led by BFU / Germany]

Sortie de piste lors de l'atterrissage

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Airline
Responsable entity Nigeria - AIB
Operator Turkey - Turk Hava Yollari (Turkish Airlines Co.)

Serious incident to the Airbus A320 registered XA-VAR operated by Aeroenlances Nacionales on 29/12/2019 en route [Investigation led by AIB / Mexico]

Problème de pressurisation, demi-tour en vol

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Airline
Responsable entity Mexico - CAA
Operator Mexico - Aeroenlaces Nacionales, S.A. De C.V.

Accident to the Zlin Savage identified 05NJ on 29/11/2019 at Aroza [Investigation led by STSB / Switzerland]

Perte de contrôle en vol

Aircraft category Microlight - Microlight-Class 3-Fixed wing
Operation Type Non-Commercial Operations - Pleasure - Local
Responsable entity Switzerland - AAIB
Operator Switzerland

Accident to the replica Fokker DR1 identified 59DPK on 28/12/2019 at Valenciennes-Denain (Nord)

Incapacité du pilote, décrochage dissymétrique en montée initiale, collision avec le sol

Aircraft category Microlight - Microlight-Class 3-Fixed wing
Operation Type Non-Commercial Operations - Pleasure - Local
Responsable entity France - BEA
Operator France

Accident to the helicopter Airbus AS350 registered N985SA on 26/12/2019 at Kauai Island, Hawai [Investigation led by NTSB / United States]

Collision avec le relief par conditions météorologiques défavorables au vol à vue

Aircraft category Helicopter - Small helicopter
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Sightseeing
Responsable entity United States - NTSB
Operator United States (Safari Helicopter Limited)

Accident to the Airbus A320 registered B-50001 operated by Tigerair Taiwan on 25/12/2019 en route [Investigation led by JTSB / Japan]

Turbulences, blessures d'un PNC en croisière

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Airline
Responsable entity Japan - JTSB
Operator Taiwan (Tigerair Taiwan Limited)

Serious incident to the Embraer ERJ190 registered B-3203 on 23/12/2019 near New Chitose [Investigation led by JTSB / Japan]

Défaillances de la génération électrique, perte des indications en cockpit, en approche

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Unknown
Responsable entity Japan - JTSB
Operator China

Serious incident to the Airbus A320 registered VT-WGL operated by Go on 23/12/2019 at Guwahati [Investigation led by AAIB / India]

Vibration moteur en vol, demi-tour, atterrissage d'urgence

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Airline
Responsable entity India - AIB
Operator India - Go Airlines (India) Private Limited

Serious incident to the Airbus A320 registered VT-WJE operated by Go on 22/12/2019 at Mumbai [Investigation led by AAIB / India]

Fortes vibrations moteur après le décollage, demi-tour, atterrissage prioritaire

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Airline
Responsable entity India - AIB
Operator India - Go Airlines (India) Private Limited

Incident to the Airbus A318 - 100 registered F-GUGD operated by Air France on 20/12/2019 close to Hyères-Le Palyvestre airport (Le Var)

Capture d’un lobe secondaire de l'ILS en approche, augmentation de l’assiette sous pilote automatique, activation des protections du domaine de vol

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Airline
Responsable entity France - BEA
Operator France - Air France
